overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a futuristic spacecraft flying over a misty, mountainous landscape at night. The scene features a detailed amber holographic HUD overlay and dense atmospheric fog effects characteristic of high-end game engine rendering, with the vehicle maintaining steady forward flight over obscured terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial flight over misty mountain range

agents.ego_description: piloting a spacecraft over a fog-covered mountain range, maintaining steady altitude and forward trajectory

entered.detail: futuristic amber-colored heads-up display with flight instruments, radar, and system indicators overlaying the viewport
dark silhouetted mountain peaks visible through dense fog in the distance
thick atmospheric mist obscuring the terrain and creating limited visibility
faint mountain silhouettes on the left horizon
faint mountain silhouettes on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous first-person cockpit view from a spacecraft flying steadily over a fog-shrouded mountain range at night. The amber holographic HUD remains fixed in the foreground displaying flight data, while the misty mountain terrain passes slowly below in the blue-gray darkness. No other vehicles or characters are present, and the atmosphere remains consistently hazy throughout the sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a spacecraft cockpit as it glides over a desolate, fog-shrouded mountain range at night. It begins with the camera moving forward through a dense, blue-gray haze that partially obscures the jagged peaks below. As the flight continues, the amber holographic HUD remains fixed in the foreground, casting a warm glow against the cold, misty atmosphere of the terrain. The scene then persists in its slow, rhythmic progression over the obscured landscape, with the hazy darkness remaining consistent as the spacecraft pushes deeper into the mountain range.
